Skip navigation links
  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractBinaryMatchingStrategy
    Base class for binary match strategies that return either a full match or no match.
    AbstractMatchingStrategy
    Shared base class for matching strategies that need common input validation.
    AbstractOrdinalMatchingStrategy
    Base class for ordinal strategies where closer values receive stronger scores.
    AbstractRangeMatchingStrategy
    Base class for strategies that score how close a value is to a preferred range.
    ActivityLevel
    Represents the activity level of an animal available for adoption.
    ActivityLevelStrategy
    A concrete matching strategy that evaluates preference alignment between the adopter's desired activity level and the animal's activity level.
    AdoptCmd
    Top-level CLI command group for the adoption request lifecycle.
    Adopter
    Represents a prospective adopter seeking to adopt an animal from a shelter.
    AdopterApplicationService
    Application service for adopter management use cases.
    AdopterApplicationServiceImpl
    Default implementation of AdopterApplicationService that orchestrates adopter registration, listing, updates, and removal across the service layer.
    AdopterBasedMatchingService
    Scores and ranks animals for a given adopter by applying a configurable set of matching strategies.
    AdopterBasedMatchingServiceImpl
    Default implementation of AdopterBasedMatchingService that aggregates scores from a configurable list of matching strategies to rank animals for a given adopter.
    AdopterCmd
    Top-level CLI command group for adopter management operations.
    AdopterPreferences
    Represents the adoption preferences of a prospective adopter.
    AdopterRepository
    Defines persistence operations for Adopter records.
    AdopterService
    Manages adopter records within the system, including registration, updates, and removal.
    AdopterServiceImpl
    Default implementation of AdopterService backed by an AdopterRepository.
    AdoptionApplicationService
    Application service for the adoption request lifecycle.
    AdoptionApplicationServiceImpl
    Default implementation of AdoptionApplicationService that orchestrates the full adoption request lifecycle: submit, approve, reject, and cancel.
    AdoptionRequest
    Represents a request submitted by an adopter to adopt a specific animal.
    AdoptionRequestRepository
    Defines persistence operations for AdoptionRequest records.
    AdoptionService
    Manages the full lifecycle of adoption requests, from initial submission through approval or rejection.
    AdoptionServiceImpl
    Concrete implementation of AdoptionService that manages the full lifecycle of adoption requests.
    AgePreferenceStrategy
    A concrete matching strategy that evaluates whether an animal's age fits the adopter's preferred age range.
    Animal
    Abstract base class representing an animal available for adoption at a shelter.
    AnimalApplicationService
    Application service for animal management use cases.
    AnimalApplicationServiceImpl
    Default implementation of AnimalApplicationService that orchestrates animal admission, listing, updates, and removal across the service layer.
    AnimalBasedMatchingService
    Scores and ranks adopters for a given animal by applying a configurable set of matching strategies.
    AnimalBasedMatchingServiceImpl
    Default implementation of AnimalBasedMatchingService that aggregates scores from a configurable list of matching strategies to rank adopters for a given animal.
    AnimalCmd
    Top-level CLI command group for animal management operations.
    AnimalNotAvailableException
    Thrown when an operation requires an animal to be available for adoption, but the animal has already been claimed by an adopter.
    AnimalNotInShelterException
    Thrown when an operation expects an animal to be present in a specific shelter, but the animal is not found there.
    AnimalRepository
    Defines persistence operations for Animal records.
    AnimalService
    Manages animal records within the system, including registration, updates, and removal.
    AnimalServiceImpl
    Default implementation of AnimalService backed by an AnimalRepository.
    AnimalView
    A read-only view of an animal enriched with its shelter's display name.
    AppContext
    Compatibility adapter for CLI commands that still call AppContext.get().
    ApplicationGraph
    Holds the fully wired application layer created during startup.
    AuditApplicationService
    Application service for retrieving the session audit log.
    AuditApplicationServiceImpl
    Default implementation of AuditApplicationService that delegates directly to the underlying AuditService to retrieve the session audit log.
    AuditCmd
    Top-level CLI command group for audit log operations.
    AuditEntry<T>
    Represents a single audit log entry recording who performed an action, what was affected, and when.
    AuditRepository
    Defines persistence operations for audit log entries across all service operations.
    AuditService<T>
    Records audit log entries for operations performed within a service.
    AuditServiceImpl<T>
    Concrete implementation of AuditService that both prints a formatted log line to the console and persists each entry to the underlying AuditRepository.
    BreedPreferenceStrategy
    A concrete matching strategy that evaluates whether an animal's breed matches the adopter's preferred breed.
    Cat
    Represents a cat available for adoption at a shelter.
    CsvAdopterRepository
    CSV-backed implementation of AdopterRepository that persists adopter records to a flat file named adopters.csv.
    CsvAdoptionRequestRepository
    CSV-backed implementation of AdoptionRequestRepository that persists adoption request records to a flat file named adoption-requests.csv.
    CsvAnimalRepository
    CSV-backed implementation of AnimalRepository that persists animal records to a flat file named animals.csv.
    CsvAuditRepository
    CSV-backed implementation of AuditRepository that appends audit log entries to a flat file named audit.csv.
    CsvRepositoryFactory
    Creates all CSV-backed repositories needed by the application.
    CsvShelterRepository
    CSV-backed implementation of ShelterRepository that persists shelter records to a flat file.
    CsvTransferRequestRepository
    CSV-backed implementation of TransferRequestRepository that persists transfer request records to a flat file named transfer-requests.csv.
    CsvUtils
    Utility class providing static helper methods for reading and writing CSV data.
    CsvVaccinationRecordRepository
    CSV-backed implementation of VaccinationRecordRepository that persists vaccination history to a flat file named vaccination-records.csv.
    CsvVaccineTypeRepository
    CSV-backed implementation of VaccineTypeRepository that persists vaccine type catalog entries to a flat file named vaccine-types.csv.
    DailySchedule
    Represents how much time an adopter typically spends at home each day.
    DataDirHash
    Computes a stable content hash over every *.csv file in a data directory.
    DataPersistenceException
    Thrown when a read or write operation on the underlying data store fails unexpectedly.
    Dog
    Represents a dog available for adoption at a shelter.
    Dog.Size
    Represents the physical size of a dog.
    EntityNotFoundException
    Thrown when a requested entity cannot be found in the repository by its identifier.
    ExplanationResult
    Represents the structured output of an ExplanationService call for a set of match results.
    ExplanationService
    Generates a structured explanation for a set of match results between animals and adopters.
    IMatchingStrategy
    Defines a scoring rule applied by the matching system to evaluate one matching criterion for an adopter-animal pair.
    InvalidRequestStatusException
    Thrown when a lifecycle operation is attempted on a request that is not in the required status.
    LifestyleCompatibilityStrategy
    A concrete matching strategy that evaluates whether an animal is a practical fit for the adopter's living space and daily schedule.
    LivingSpace
    Represents the type of living space an adopter occupies.
    Main
    Entry point for the shelter CLI tool.
    MarkdownRenderer
    Renders the full system snapshot as markdown suitable for VS Code's preview pane.
    MatchCmd
    Top-level CLI command group for animal-adopter matching operations.
    MatchingApplicationService
    Application service for animal-adopter matching use cases.
    MatchingApplicationServiceImpl
    Default implementation of MatchingApplicationService that orchestrates animal-adopter matching in both directions.
    MatchingCriterion
    Represents the supported criteria that may be used in the matching system.
    MatchingPreferencesPriority
    Represents one prioritized matching criterion selected by a user.
    MatchingPreferencesProfile
    Represents the full prioritized matching setup selected by a user.
    MatchingScoreCalculator
    Calculates the final match score by combining applicable strategy scores.
    MatchResult
    Represents the result of a single match between an animal and an adopter.
    MockExplanationService
    A deterministic, non-AI implementation of ExplanationService used as the default placeholder until AIExplanationService is integrated.
    NotificationRecord
    Represents a record of a notification that was dispatched by a staff member.
    Other
    Represents an animal of an unclassified or uncommon species available for adoption.
    OverdueVaccination
    Represents a vaccination that is overdue for a specific animal.
    PrintCmd
    Top-level CLI command that renders the full system state.
    Rabbit
    Represents a rabbit available for adoption at a shelter.
    Rabbit.FurLength
    Represents the fur length of a rabbit.
    RepositoryBundle
    Groups all repositories created during startup into one object.
    RequestNotificationService
    Dispatches notifications to relevant parties when the status of a request changes.
    RequestNotificationServiceImpl
    Concrete implementation of RequestNotificationService that prints formatted notification messages to the console and maintains an in-memory record of all dispatched notifications for the duration of the current command execution.
    RequestStatus
    Represents the lifecycle status of a request, such as an adoption or transfer request.
    Shelter
    Represents an animal shelter that holds a collection of animals available for adoption.
    ShelterAnimalLinker
    Restores in-memory links from loaded animals back to their shelters.
    ShelterApplicationService
    Application service for shelter management use cases.
    ShelterApplicationServiceImpl
    Default implementation of ShelterApplicationService that orchestrates shelter registration, updates, removal, and listing across the service layer.
    ShelterAtCapacityException
    Thrown when an animal cannot be added to a shelter because the shelter has already reached its maximum capacity.
    ShelterCmd
    Top-level CLI command group for shelter management operations.
    ShelterRepository
    Defines persistence operations for Shelter records.
    ShelterService
    Manages shelter records within the system, including registration, updates, and closure.
    ShelterServiceImpl
    Default implementation of ShelterService backed by a ShelterRepository.
    SnapshotRenderer
    Renders the full 8-section system snapshot as plain text.
    Species
    Represents the species of an animal in the shelter system.
    SpeciesMismatchException
    Thrown when a vaccine type is applied to an animal of a different species than the vaccine is approved for.
    SpeciesPreferenceStrategy
    A concrete matching strategy that evaluates whether an animal's species matches the adopter's preferred species.
    Staff
    Represents a staff member operating the shelter management system.
    StaffService
    Loads the current operator's staff profile from a file at application startup.
    StaffServiceImpl
    Default implementation of StaffService that loads a staff profile from a CSV file.
    SystemStartup
    Handles system initialization at startup, loading all persisted data and setting up session state.
    SystemStartupImpl
    Coordinates startup for the shelter CLI application.
    TransferApplicationService
    Application service for the inter-shelter transfer request lifecycle.
    TransferApplicationServiceImpl
    Default implementation of TransferApplicationService that orchestrates inter-shelter transfer requests across the service layer.
    TransferCmd
    Top-level CLI command group for the inter-shelter transfer request lifecycle.
    TransferRequest
    Represents a request to transfer an animal from one shelter to another.
    TransferRequestRepository
    Defines persistence operations for TransferRequest records.
    TransferService
    Handles inter-shelter animal transfers, including creating and resolving transfer requests.
    TransferServiceImpl
    Concrete implementation of TransferService that orchestrates inter-shelter animal transfers.
    VaccinationApplicationService
    Application service for vaccination and vaccine type management use cases.
    VaccinationApplicationServiceImpl
    Default implementation of VaccinationApplicationService that orchestrates vaccination recording, overdue checks, and vaccine type catalog management.
    VaccinationInfoProvider
    A narrow abstraction that exposes only the vaccination facts needed by matching strategies.
    VaccinationPreferenceStrategy
    A concrete matching strategy related to vaccination status.
    VaccinationRecord
    Represents a single vaccination event for an animal in the shelter system.
    VaccinationRecordRepository
    Defines persistence operations for VaccinationRecord records.
    VaccinationRecordView
    Application-layer DTO that bundles a VaccinationRecord with the display names of its associated animal and vaccine type.
    VaccinationService
    Tracks vaccination records for animals and identifies overdue vaccinations.
    VaccinationServiceImpl
    Concrete implementation of VaccinationService that records vaccination events, checks overdue status against each vaccine type's validity period, and queries vaccination history by animal.
    VaccineCmd
    Top-level CLI command group for vaccination management operations.
    VaccineType
    Represents a type of vaccine that can be administered to animals in the shelter system.
    VaccineTypeCatalogService
    Manages the catalog of vaccine types available in the system, supporting full CRUD operations.
    VaccineTypeCatalogServiceImpl
    Default implementation of VaccineTypeCatalogService backed by a VaccineTypeRepository.
    VaccineTypeRepository
    Defines persistence operations for VaccineType records.
    WorkdirBootstrapper
    Prepares the shelter demo work directory before repositories load data.
